title.ko: 심해의 순수함: AQUA-5 딥 오션 에디션
title.en: Abyssal Purity: AQUA-5 Deep Ocean Edition

description.ko: 심해의 깊은 고요함을 경험해 보세요. AQUA-5 딥 오션은 심연의 압도적인 수압과 투명함을 담아내어, 바다처럼 광대하고 영원한 수분감을 선사합니다.
description.en: Experience the profound stillness of the midnight zone. AQUA-5 Deep Ocean captures the crushing pressure and absolute clarity of the abyss, delivering hydration that feels as vast and eternal as the sea itself.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a sleek, transparent AQUA-5 bottle submerged in deep indigo ocean water, bioluminescent plankton glowing in soft neon blues and cyans around the base, ethereal light rays filtering from the distant surface, ultra-realistic textures, 8k resolution, serene and mysterious underwater atmosphere.
